A '''[[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]]''' had traveled with a young [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] hundreds of years before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] and the two crash-landed on an [[Unidentified swamp planet|unknown swamp world]].

They were found by the [[Hysalrian/Legends|Hysalrian]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[N'Kata Del Gormo/Legends|N'Kata Del Gormo]], who started instructing them in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Yoda was fully [[Jedi training/Legends|trained]] and became a [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].
